cluster_description.value: rapidly upregulated genes including N transporters

supporting_quotes.quote: K-means cluster (K=7). All genes differentially expressed at q<0.05 for one or more timepoint after t=0h were clustered (559 genes). GENE	CLUSTER	CYANOBASE_FUNCTIONAL_CATEGORY	GENE_FUNCTION
PMT0991	1	Translation	Aminoacyl tRNA synthetases and tRNA modification
PMT0990	1	Other categories	Adaptations and atypical conditions	possible high light inducible protein
PMT2240	1	Other categories	Other	Formate and nitrite transporters
PMT2239	1	Amino acid biosynthesis	Glutamate family / Nitrogen assimilation	Ferredoxin--nitrite reductase
PMT2229	1	Transport and binding proteins		"putative urea ABC transporter, substrate binding protein"
PMT1831	1	Transport and binding proteins		"Global nitrogen regulatory protein, CRP family of transcriptional regulators"
PMT0992	1	Other categories	Adaptations and atypical conditions	possible high light inducible protein
Cluster 1, the most rapidly and highly upregulated genes in each strain, contains N transport genes such as MED4 and MIT9313 urtA, MED4 cynA, and the MIT9313 nitrite permease.

cluster_description.value: upregulated regulatory genes including sigma factors
an upregulated MIT9313 gene cluster (cluster 2) containing two sigma factors

supporting_quotes.quote: cluster 2). Both strains also have an upregulated cluster containing two sigma factors, MED4 cluster 5 and MIT9313 cluster 2. Examination of the individual genes composing the repressed clusters also reveals intercluster differences, even between clusters enriched for the same CyanoBase functional category.

We found that two out of five MED4 sigma factors (PMM1289 and PMM1697) and two out of seven MIT9313 sigma factors (PMT2246 and PMT0346) were upregulated (Figure 4B), and may therefore play a role in the upregulation of gene expression during N stress in Prochlorococcus.
Both strains also have an upregulated cluster containing two sigma factors, MED4 cluster 5 and MIT9313 cluster 2.

In both strains, the clusters revealed two distinct subsets of the hli genes: those that responded rapidly and highly (MED4 cluster 2 and MIT9313 cluster 1) and those that responded later and to a lesser degree (MED4 cluster 3 and MIT9313 cluster 2).

enrichment_details.value: includes photosystem I and II genes

MIT9313 cluster 6 is the only MIT9313 cluster enriched for Photosynthesis and Respiration in this strain and contains genes for diverse aspects of photosystem I and II along with the phycoerythrin gene, cpeB.

cluster_description.value: MIT9313 cluster 6 is the only cluster enriched for Photosynthesis and Respiration in this strain and contains genes for diverse aspects of photosystem I and II along with the phycoerythrin gene, cpeB. The cluster appears repressed under the N-starvation time course.

supporting_quotes.quote: The repressed clusters that were significantly enriched for single functional categories (MED4 clusters 7-9 and MIT9313 clusters 6 and 7) also shed light on the role of a number of genes of unknown function.

cluster 7, MIT9313 cluster 7) and Photo­synthesis and Respiration (MED4 clusters 8 and 9, MIT9313 cluster 6) (Figure 3). Even though the functional enrichment in the upregulated clusters did not attain statistical significance, these clusters do contain noteworthy sets of functionally related genes.
MIT9313 cluster 6, the only cluster enriched for Photosynthesis and Respiration in this strain, contains genes for diverse aspects of photosystem I and II along with the phycoerythrin gene, cpeB.

1.functional_description: Enrichment category: Transport and binding proteins (table very_high p=0.0434941; visual high p=0.04; semantic medium p=0.043494). High-confidence gene set includes PMT0991, PMT0990, PMT2240, PMT2239, PMT2229, PMT1831, and PMT0992; nitrite permease (urtA) is noted in the visual source. This cluster represents nitrogen-transport related proteins, consistent with nitrogen starvation conditions.
1.behavioral_description: Direction: up. Temporal pattern: initial upregulation at 6 h with peak at 6 h, described as rapidly upregulated.

2.functional_description: Enrichment category: Regulatory functions (table very_high p=0.027658; visual high p=0.03). Includes sigma factors. High-confidence gene set lists PMT1154, PMT2246, PMT0039, PMT0488, PMT1144, PMT1152, PMT1874, PMT0382, PMT0565, PMT0951, PMT2241, PMT0993, PMT0963, PMT1314, PMT1608, PMT1946, PMT0939, PMT0601, PMT1631, PMT1640, PMT0937, PMT0346, PMT0845, PMT0649, PMT0971, PMT0952, PMT0964, PMT2174, PMT1853, PMT1153, PMT0988, PMT0908, PMT0201, PMT0805, PMT1007, PMT1341 (with visual confirmation of PMT0346 and PMT2246; sigma factors PMT2246 and PMT0346 highlighted).
2.behavioral_description: Direction: up. Temporal pattern: upregulated at 24 h, indicating a regulatory/signal-transduction response during the nitrogen-starvation time course.

5.functional_description: Enrichment category: Fatty acid, phospholipid and sterol metabolism; visual category: fatty acid and phospholipid (table p=0.00395257; visual p=0.004). Genes include 113 listed IDs (e.g., PMT1219, PMT0081, PMT1323, PMT1272, PMT0568, PMT1750, PMT2172, PMT1897, PMT2119, PMT1124, PMT1507, PMT1063, PMT1505, PMT0817, PMT1450, PMT0606, PMT0754, PMT0616, PMT1504, PMT1730, PMT1306, PMT1668, PMT2091, PMT0032, PMT1449, PMT0628, PMT1859, PMT0162, PMT1760, PMT0445, PMT0055, PMT2162, PMT1915, PMT1816, PMT1307, PMT1754, PMT2088, PMT1777, PMT0276, ... PMT1449 etc.). The semantic enrichment notes involvement in fatty acid/phospholipid pathways and lipid metabolism, consistent with downregulation during nitrogen starvation.
5.behavioral_description: Direction: down. Temporal_pattern: downregulation during N starvation, reaching or persisting through the 48 h final time point.

6.functional_description: Enrichment category: Photosynthesis and respiration (table very_high p=0.000498678; visual high p=4.9e-04; semantic medium). Includes genes for photosystem I and II and the phycoerythrin gene cpeB (e.g., broad set of photosynthesis/respiration components). The MIT9313 cluster 6 is the only MIT9313 cluster enriched for this category in this study.
6.behavioral_description: Direction: down. Temporal_pattern: downregulation throughout the nitrogen-starvation time course (0–48 h).

7.functional_description: Enrichment category: Translation (table very_high p=7.8986e-10; visual high p=7.9e-10). Genes are translation-related (ribosomal/protein synthesis components), including PMT0907, PMT1574, PMT1761, PMT1748, PMT1734, PMT1736, PMT1747, PMT1733, PMT1081, PMT1572, PMT2090, PMT1759, PMT1573, PMT1758, PMT1737, PMT1470, PMT1956, PMT0169, PMT1479, PMT1471, PMT0551, PMT1741, PMT1732, PMT1756, PMT1472, PMT1083, PMT1739, PMT0582, PMT1468, PMT1742, PMT1469, PMT0535, PMT1473, PMT1740, PMT0583, PMT1743, PMT1904, PMT1746, PMT1527, PMT1789, PMT1745, PMT1738, PMT1467, PMT1506, PMT1466, PMT1735, PMT1744, PMT1377, PMT2158, PMT1753, PMT0177.
7.behavioral_description: Direction: down. Temporal_pattern: downregulation during N starvation, indicating suppression of translation-related genes across the time course.
